description: Title Search and Commitment — processes title searches, classifies exceptions in Schedule B, identifies deal-killer defects, tracks curative actions, and produces commitment documents for underwriting.

hard_stops.label: Deal-Killer Exception Block Closing
hard_stops.logic: Title search reveals a deal-killer exception (e.g., unresolvable cloud on title) — block closing until resolved or waived by underwriter.

hard_stops.label: Curative Item Unresolved Block Recording
hard_stops.logic: One or more curative items remain unresolved — block recording until all curative actions are completed.

hard_stops.label: Title Not Clear Block Disbursement
hard_stops.logic: Title has not been cleared by the title officer — block disbursement until clear title is confirmed.

soft_flags.label: Non-Standard Exception
soft_flags.logic: Title search contains a non-standard exception that may require additional endorsement or underwriter review.

soft_flags.label: Endorsement Recommended
soft_flags.logic: Title officer recommends an additional endorsement to address a specific exception.

soft_flags.label: Chain of Title Gap
soft_flags.logic: A gap exists in the chain of title — may require affidavit or quiet title action.
